\tzpentry{ID4714}{Spectral Gap Laplacian Operator}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4714 introduces Spectral Gap Laplacian Operator as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{align}\n\\Delta l &= 0, \\pm 1, \\pm 2 \\\\\n\\Delta m &= 0, \\pm 1\n\\end{align}
